mapper.insert: INSERT INTO issue_feedback (username, feedback_type, title, content, contact, feedback_log_url, feedback_screenshot_url, client_version, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{feedbackType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{contact}, #{feedbackLogUrl}, #{feedbackScreenshotUrl}, #{clientVersion}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
